statement: agent-enterprise's only genuinely differentiated substrate elements versus 2026 commodity tooling are (a) {{token}} build-time templating combined with (b) build-time security validation of inputs (injection/supply-chain) — the raw multi-target emit is redundant.

evidence.quote: No token templating... no prompt-injection defenses or input sanitization documented.
LLMs process trusted instructions and untrusted data through the same token stream with no architectural separation — build-time concatenation tools do not address this.

falsifier: ai-rulez 'security auditor' / 'input validation rules' or rulesync secretlint integration turn out to deliver equivalent build-time injection/supply-chain validation, collapsing the residual novelty to near-zero.
